  [Submitted on 21 Sep 2023 ( v1 ), last revised 14 Oct 2023 (this version, v2)] 
     Title: How Robust is Google's Bard to Adversarial Image Attacks? 
     Authors: Yinpeng Dong ,  Huanran Chen ,  Jiawei Chen ,  Zhengwei Fang ,  Xiao Yang ,  Yichi Zhang ,  Yu Tian ,  Hang Su ,  Jun Zhu              View a PDF of the paper titled How Robust is Google's Bard to Adversarial Image Attacks?, by Yinpeng Dong and 8 other authors 
     View PDF 



     
             Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) that integrate text and other modalities (especially vision) have achieved unprecedented performance in various multimodal tasks. However, due to the unsolved adversarial robustness problem of vision models, MLLMs can have more severe safety and
